incident.message: `PreferenceActivity` subclass org.sipdroid.sipua.ui.Settings should not be exported
`USE_EXACT_ALARM` can only be used when targeting API level 33 or higher

entry.name: message
entry.string: Resource references will not work correctly in images generated for this vector icon for API < %1$d; check generated icon to make sure it looks acceptable

incident.message: Consider adding `android:layout_marginEnd="8dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginRight` with `android:layout_marginEnd="8dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider adding `android:layout_marginStart="6dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginLeft` with `android:layout_marginStart="6dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider adding `android:layout_marginEnd="8dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginRight` with `android:layout_marginEnd="8dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Use "`start`" instead of "`left`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
Consider adding `android:layout_marginEnd="6dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginRight` with `android:layout_marginEnd="6dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider adding `android:layout_marginStart="6dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginLeft` with `android:layout_marginStart="6dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider adding `android:layout_marginEnd="8dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginRight` with `android:layout_marginEnd="8dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Use "`start`" instead of "`left`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
Consider adding `android:layout_marginEnd="6dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginRight` with `android:layout_marginEnd="6dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
When you define `paddingRight` you should probably also define `paddingLeft` for right-to-left symmetry
Consider adding `android:paddingEnd="6dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:paddingRight` with `android:paddingEnd="6dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
`android:password` is deprecated: Use `inputType` instead
`android:password` is deprecated: Use `inputType` instead
Use "`start`" instead of "`left`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
Use "`end`" instead of "`right`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
Consider adding `android:layout_marginStart="12dp"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginLeft` with `android:layout_marginStart="12dp"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider adding `android:layout_marginStart="12dp"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginLeft` with `android:layout_marginStart="12dp"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider adding `android:layout_marginStart="12dp"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginLeft` with `android:layout_marginStart="12dp"` to better support right-to-left layouts

entry.name: message
entry.string: Attribute `elevation` is only used in API level 21 and higher (current min is %1$s)

incident.message: Consider adding `android:layout_marginEnd="6dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginRight` with `android:layout_marginEnd="6dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
When you define `paddingLeft` you should probably also define `paddingRight` for right-to-left symmetry
Consider adding `android:paddingStart="4dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:paddingLeft` with `android:paddingStart="4dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts

entry.name: message
entry.string: `?android:attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless` requires API level 21 (current min is %1$s)

incident.message: Consider adding `android:layout_alignParentEnd="true"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_alignParentRight` with `android:layout_alignParentEnd="true"` to better support right-to-left layouts

entry.name: message
entry.string: Attribute `backgroundTint` is only used in API level 21 and higher (current min is %1$s)

entry.name: message
entry.string: `?android:attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless` requires API level 21 (current min is %1$s)

incident.message: Use "`start`" instead of "`left`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
Consider adding `android:layout_marginStart="4dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginLeft` with `android:layout_marginStart="4dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
When you define `paddingRight` you should probably also define `paddingLeft` for right-to-left symmetry
Consider adding `android:paddingEnd="6dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:paddingRight` with `android:paddingEnd="6dip"` to better support right-to-left layouts
`android:password` is deprecated: Use `inputType` instead
`android:password` is deprecated: Use `inputType` instead
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 24
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 23
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 23
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 23
The WIFI_SERVICE must be looked up on the Application context or memory will leak on devices < Android N. Try changing `getUIContext()` to `getUIContext().getApplicationContext()`
Consider adding a `<queries>` declaration to your manifest when calling this \ method; see https://g.co/dev/packagevisibility for details
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 26
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 26

entry.name: message
entry.string: Call requires API level 23 (current min is %1$s): `android.telecom.Connection#setDisconnected`

entry.name: message
entry.string: Call requires API level 23 (current min is %1$s): `new android.telecom.DisconnectCause`

entry.name: message
entry.string: Field requires API level 23 (current min is %1$s): `android.telecom.DisconnectCause#LOCAL`

entry.name: message
entry.string: Call requires API level 23 (current min is %1$s): `android.telecom.Connection#destroy`

entry.name: message
entry.string: Call requires API level 23 (current min is %1$s): `android.telecom.Connection#setActive`

entry.name: message
entry.string: Call requires API level 23 (current min is %1$s): `android.telecom.Connection#setOnHold`

entry.name: message
entry.string: Call requires API level 23 (current min is %1$s): `android.telecom.Connection#setRingbackRequested`

incident.message: Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 26
When targeting Android 13 or higher, posting a permission requires holding the `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` permission
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 23
Consider adding a `<queries>` declaration to your manifest when calling this \ method; see https://g.co/dev/packagevisibility for details
The WIFI_SERVICE must be looked up on the Application context or memory will leak on devices < Android N. Try changing `mContext` to `mContext.getApplicationContext()`
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 31
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 24
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 9
`m_receiver = new Receiver()` \ is missing `RECEIVER_EXPORTED` or `RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED` flag for unprotected \ broadcasts registered for vpn.connectivity
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 23
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 23

entry.name: message
